title: Adutha Paruppu Lyrics Rendavudhu Padam Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vijay Prakash, Velmurugan, Mukesh
Music: Kannan
Movie: Rendavudhu Padam
Song: Adutha Paruppu
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar,

.
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
adutha paruppu naanthaanda
maama nee autograph-u vaangen da

paduthukitte jeyipenda aama
nee press meetu vaiyenda
(yaar petha pillaye ippadi
kiru pidichu alayudhu)

Yen kaatil mazhayada
vandhu kaala pidingada

Naan vandhu ninnaa
cameravum fan-u aagum da
naan kaithudaika check-u book-um
tissue aagum da

en face-u vandha TRp-um
aegiri pogum da

en photo-kuda copy right-il
kaasu allum da

adutha paruppu naanthaanda
maama nee autograph-u vaangen da

paduthukitte jeyipenda aama
nee press meetu vaiyenda

(ennada satham ..
yedho saavu machi ..
indha naayi saaga matingudhey

machaan adutha prabhu dheva
ivan thaanda
edhula machaan..
apppadilaam ketkakudaadhu)

fashion showla ramp walk poven
ad-u film-la shampoo vippen

..
Friendsu thaanda usuru enaku
paadhi sotha ezhudhi veppen

Naan yeni pottu mela yera poren
naan yelaikellaam vaari tharra poren
en rasikar mandra thalaivar neethanda

edhuku edhuku naye indha
aagaadha aasa
vidya vidiya suttaaalum nee
vegaadha dhosa
ketkuravab kenaiyilla
venaamda boss-u

nee atom bombu illa maachan
oosi pattaasu
yei.

adutha paruppu naanthaanda
maama nee autograph-u vaangen da

paduthukitte jeyipenda aama
nee press meetu vaiyenda

Naan vandhu ninnaa
camera
...poitaangala ....ok ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Adutha Paruppu?

The song is sung by Mukesh, Velmurugan, and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for the movie Rendavudhu Padam?

The music was composed by Kannan.

What is the theme of the song Adutha Paruppu?

The song has an upbeat and energetic theme, making it perfect for celebrations and parties.

When was the movie Rendavudhu Padam released?

The movie was released in the year 2013.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Rendavudhu Padam?

The lead roles were played by Vimal and Vijayalakshmi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adutha Paruppu from the 2013 Tamil movie Rendavudhu Padam, featuring actors Vimal and Vijayalakshmi, is a lively and energetic track. Composed by Kannan with lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar, the song is performed by Mukesh, Velmurugan, and Vijay Prakash. Its vibrant beats and engaging lyrics make it a perfect choice for celebrations and festive occasions. The song captures the essence of joy and enthusiasm, resonating with audiences of all ages.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adutha Paruppu, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Rendavudhu Padam, showcases the exceptional collaboration of music director Kannan and lyricist Na Muthukumar. Sung by Mukesh, Velmurugan, and Vijay Prakash, this song captivates listeners with its lively beats and engaging lyrics. Dive into the rhythmic world of Tamil cinema with this unforgettable musical piece.
stanzaMeanings: Singers: Vijay Prakash, Velmurugan, Mukesh Music: Kannan Movie: Rendavudhu Padam Song: Adutha Paruppu Lyrics: Na Muthukumar
Next bean, uncle, you take the autograph.
After practicing, you will win, yes, don't miss the press meet (whoever's child is caught like this is in trouble).
The rain has come to my heart, holding my time.
When I come, you will become the camera and fan, I will be the checkbook and tissue.
When my face appears, the TRP will go up.
Even my photo has copyright and money involved.
Next bean, uncle, you take the autograph.
After practicing, you will win, yes, don't miss the press meet.
(What is this sound? Something is dying, man, this dog is barking.)
Man, the next god is this guy, man... don't ask about that.
I will walk the ramp in the fashion show, I will shine in the film like shampoo.
Friends are my life, I will write half of my story.
I will put my head and go up, I will bring everything down.
You are the leader of my fans.
Why this unnecessary desire, even if you throw a stone, you won't get a dosa, boss.
You are not an atom bomb, man, you are just a small firecracker.
Hey.
Next bean, uncle, you take the autograph.
After practicing, you will win, yes, don't miss the press meet.
I came to you, camera... did they go away... okay..
English Translation I tried my best :) [english lyric]
